location: Roundtable Hold — behind the first Imp Statue seal (costs 1 Stonesword Key), down the stairs past Blacksmith Hewg's workshop; comes with 20x Black-Key Bolts

source.name: Imp Statue seal (Stonesword Key vault), Roundtable Hold

tactics: From the Roundtable Hold entrance, head down the stairs past Hewg's smithing area and double back to find the fogged Imp Statue door
Costs 1 Stonesword Key to open — don't confuse it with other, later Imp Statue doors deeper in the Hold that need different keys
No combat involved, it's a guaranteed pickup the moment the seal is broken
lore: A long-stocked black crossbow that belonged to Crepus, a confessor who quietly served the Two Fingers from within the Roundtable Hold; built for sniping at long range.

builds.name: Long-range sniper
builds.why: Has the longest range of the standard/somber crossbows, good for picking off distant targets or landing status bolts from well outside enemy aggro range
